summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ABSCO All Building Services Company website. Backend APIs working perfectly (5/5 tests passed). Frontend functionality largely successful with excellent contact form integration, gallery functionality, and SEO implementation. One critical mobile responsiveness issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Hamburger menu button not visible/clickable on mobile viewport (390px)
ui_bugs.description: Mobile hamburger menu has visibility issues - desktop navigation shows instead of mobile menu at 390px width. CSS responsive breakpoints may be incorrect.

passed_tests: Contact form submission with valid data
Contact form validation (invalid email, missing fields)
Navigation bar with all links and Call Now button
WhatsApp button with correct phone number (+502 55964028)
Gallery section with Photos/Videos tabs functionality
Contact form backend integration (email sending via Resend)
Company information display (address, phone, email, contact person)
Footer with quick links and contact information
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix mobile hamburger menu visibility issue - the menu button is not showing properly on mobile viewport (390px width). Desktop navigation is displaying instead of the mobile hamburger menu, suggesting CSS responsive breakpoint issues.
